requirement_topic.en: PSE Mandatory Marking (Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act)
requirement_topic.zh: PSE强制标志（电气用品安全法）
requirement_topic.zht: PSE強制標誌（電氣用品安全法）

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters (up to 600 V AC output) are classified as Specified Electrical Appliances and Materials (特定電気用品) under Japan's Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act (電気用品安全法, Denan). They must bear the PSE diamond mark. Manufacturers or importers must register with METI, conduct third-party conformity assessment by a registered inspection body (登録検査機関), and maintain technical documentation. The product must conform to applicable JIS or equivalent technical standards before sale or distribution in Japan.
summary.zh: 并网光伏逆变器（交流输出电压不超过600 V）在日本《电气用品安全法》（Denan）下被列为「特定电气用品」，须标注PSE菱形标志。制造商或进口商须在经济产业省（METI）登记，由经注册的检查机关进行第三方合格评定，并保存技术文件。产品在日本销售或流通前须符合适用的JIS或等效技术标准。
summary.zht: 並網光伏逆變器（交流輸出電壓不超過600 V）在日本《電氣用品安全法》（Denan）下被列為「特定電氣用品」，須標注PSE菱形標誌。製造商或進口商須在經濟產業省（METI）登記，由經註冊的檢查機關進行第三方合格評定，並保存技術文件。產品在日本銷售或流通前須符合適用的JIS或等效技術標準。

standards_or_laws: 電気用品安全法 (Denan / Act No. 234 of 1961, as amended)
JIS C 8961 (Testing methods for power conditioners for small wind turbine / PV systems — referenced for PV inverter safety) [UNVERIFIED — confirm applicability scope]
JIS C 62109-1 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1, equivalent to IEC 62109-1)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverters typically comply with GB/T 37408 (technical requirements for PV inverters) and IEC 62109-1/-2 via the CB Scheme or CQC certification. CE marking (EU) and CQC marks are common on export products. However, neither GB/T 37408, CB certificates, nor CE marks are accepted as substitutes for PSE conformity assessment under Japan's Denan law.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器通常依据GB/T 37408（光伏并网逆变器技术规范）以及通过CB体系或CQC认证取得IEC 62109-1/-2合规证明。出口产品常见CE标志和CQC标志。但GB/T 37408、CB证书及CE标志均不被日本Denan法律的PSE合格评定程序所接受。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器通常依據GB/T 37408（光伏並網逆變器技術規範）以及通過CB體系或CQC認證取得IEC 62109-1/-2合規證明。出口產品常見CE標誌和CQC標誌。但GB/T 37408、CB證書及CE標誌均不被日本Denan法律的PSE合格評定程序所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 (光伏发电并网逆变器技术规范)

gap.en: The core gap is procedural and legal: PSE conformity requires registration with METI and third-party assessment by a Japan-registered inspection body. CB certificates, CE declarations, and CQC marks are not recognised by METI as substitutes. Additionally, JIS C 62109-1 (Japan's adopted equivalent of IEC 62109-1) may contain Japan-specific deviations that require re-testing even where IEC 62109 test data already exists.
gap.zh: 核心差距在于程序与法律层面：PSE合格评定须在METI登记，并由日本注册检查机关进行第三方审查，CB证书、CE声明及CQC标志均不被METI认可为替代依据。此外，JIS C 62109-1（日本采用IEC 62109-1的版本）可能含有日本特有偏差，即便已有IEC 62109测试数据，亦可能需要重新测试。
gap.zht: 核心差距在於程序與法律層面：PSE合格評定須在METI登記，並由日本註冊檢查機關進行第三方審查，CB證書、CE聲明及CQC標誌均不被METI認可為替代依據。此外，JIS C 62109-1（日本採用IEC 62109-1的版本）可能含有日本特有偏差，即便已有IEC 62109測試數據，亦可能需要重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — statutory requirement before sale in Japan
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable as export requirement; CB/CQC voluntary for domestic CN market

source.publisher: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: A grid-tied PV inverter manufactured in China targeting the Japanese market must undergo PSE conformity assessment by a METI-registered inspection body and obtain the PSE diamond mark prior to import or sale. Existing CB, CE, or CQC certifications do not fulfil this requirement. [UNVERIFIED — confirm current list of registered inspection bodies and exact technical standard reference accepted by METI]
compliance_verdict.zh: 针对日本市场的中国产并网光伏逆变器，须在进口或销售前由METI注册检查机关完成PSE合格评定并取得PSE菱形标志。现有CB、CE或CQC认证不能满足此要求。[UNVERIFIED — 请核实METI当前接受的注册检查机关名单及适用技术标准]
compliance_verdict.zht: 針對日本市場的中國產並網光伏逆變器，須在進口或銷售前由METI註冊檢查機關完成PSE合格評定並取得PSE菱形標誌。現有CB、CE或CQC認證不能滿足此要求。[UNVERIFIED — 請核實METI當前接受的註冊檢查機關名單及適用技術標準]

requirement_topic.en: Technical Standard Conformity — JIS C 62109 for PV Inverter Safety
requirement_topic.zh: 技术标准合规——光伏逆变器安全JIS C 62109
requirement_topic.zht: 技術標準合規——光伏逆變器安全JIS C 62109

summary.en: Under the Denan framework, PV inverters must conform to the technical standards designated by METI. JIS C 62109-1 (general safety requirements for power converters used in PV systems, equivalent to IEC 62109-1) and JIS C 62109-2 (inverter-specific requirements) are the primary referenced standards. Conformity is demonstrated through testing by a registered inspection body; test reports must follow JIS-specified test methods. METI publishes the official list of applicable technical standards (技術基準) for each product category.
summary.zh: 在Denan框架下，光伏逆变器须符合METI指定的技术标准。JIS C 62109-1（光伏系统用电力变换装置通用安全要求，等同IEC 62109-1）及JIS C 62109-2（逆变器专项要求）为主要参考标准。合规性须通过注册检查机关测试证明；测试报告须遵循JIS规定的测试方法。METI就各产品类别公布适用技术标准（技術基準）的官方清单。
summary.zht: 在Denan框架下，光伏逆變器須符合METI指定的技術標準。JIS C 62109-1（光伏系統用電力變換裝置通用安全要求，等同IEC 62109-1）及JIS C 62109-2（逆變器專項要求）為主要參考標準。合規性須通過註冊檢查機關測試證明；測試報告須遵循JIS規定的測試方法。METI就各產品類別公布適用技術標準（技術基準）的官方清單。

standards_or_laws: JIS C 62109-1 (equivalent to IEC 62109-1:2010, safety of power converters for use in PV power systems — Part 1: General requirements)
JIS C 62109-2 (equivalent to IEC 62109-2:2011, Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters) [UNVERIFIED — confirm JIS adoption status and year]
METI Technical Standards (技術基準) gazette for 電気用品

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers commonly obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports under the CB Scheme from IECEE-accredited Chinese laboratories (e.g., CGC, TUV Rheinland China, CQC). These CB reports are internationally recognised but are not automatically accepted under Japan's PSE system because the registered inspection body must be approved by METI, not merely IECEE-accredited.
summary.zh: 中国制造商通常通过IECEE认可的中国实验室（如CGC、莱茵技术、CQC）取得IEC 62109-1/-2的CB体系测试报告。这些CB报告获国际认可，但并不自动被日本PSE体系接受，原因在于注册检查机关须经METI批准，而非仅凭IECEE认可。
summary.zht: 中國製造商通常通過IECEE認可的中國實驗室（如CGC、萊茵技術、CQC）取得IEC 62109-1/-2的CB體系測試報告。這些CB報告獲國際認可，但並不自動被日本PSE體系接受，原因在於註冊檢查機關須經METI批准，而非僅憑IECEE認可。

gap.en: Even where a Chinese inverter holds a valid IEC 62109 CB certificate, the certificate cannot be directly used for PSE. The applicant must engage a METI-registered inspection body (登録検査機関), which may accept CB test data as reference but will conduct its own review against JIS standards and issue a separate conformity certificate. Any JIS-specific deviations from IEC 62109 must be addressed. This adds cost, time, and a Japan-specific certification step that has no CN-market parallel.
gap.zh: 即使中国逆变器持有有效的IEC 62109 CB证书，该证书亦不能直接用于PSE。申请人须委托METI注册检查机关，后者可将CB测试数据作为参考，但将依据JIS标准进行独立审查并颁发独立合格证书。JIS相对IEC 62109的任何特有偏差须予解决。这增加了成本、时间及一个在中国市场无对应项的日本专项认证步骤。
gap.zht: 即使中國逆變器持有有效的IEC 62109 CB證書，該證書亦不能直接用於PSE。申請人須委託METI註冊檢查機關，後者可將CB測試數據作為參考，但將依據JIS標準進行獨立審查並頒發獨立合格證書。JIS相對IEC 62109的任何特有偏差須予解決。這增加了成本、時間及一個在中國市場無對應項的日本專項認證步驟。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — technical standard conformity is a statutory condition of PSE marking
mandatory_status.cn: IEC 62109 CB certification is voluntary; GB/T 37408 is the mandatory national standard for grid-connected inverters in China

source.publisher: Japanese Industrial Standards Committee (JISC), Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry

compliance_verdict.en: Conformity to JIS C 62109-1/-2 (or METI-accepted equivalent technical standards) is required for PSE diamond mark certification. CB test reports based on IEC 62109 may serve as supporting evidence but do not replace the METI-registered inspection body review. Manufacturers should verify the current METI technical standard gazette for the exact JIS versions in force. [UNVERIFIED — confirm whether METI currently accepts CB data as partial evidence and the exact gazette reference]
compliance_verdict.zh: 要取得PSE菱形标志认证，须符合JIS C 62109-1/-2（或METI认可的等效技术标准）。基于IEC 62109的CB测试报告可作为支持性证据，但不能取代METI注册检查机关的审查。制造商应核实METI当前技术标准公告中现行的JIS版本。[UNVERIFIED — 请确认METI是否接受CB数据作为部分证据及确切公告参考号]
compliance_verdict.zht: 要取得PSE菱形標誌認證，須符合JIS C 62109-1/-2（或METI認可的等效技術標準）。基於IEC 62109的CB測試報告可作為支持性證據，但不能取代METI註冊檢查機關的審查。製造商應核實METI當前技術標準公告中現行的JIS版本。[UNVERIFIED — 請確認METI是否接受CB數據作為部分證據及確切公告參考號]

requirement_topic.en: Importer / Notifier Registration Obligation under Denan
requirement_topic.zh: Denan法下进口商/申报人登记义务
requirement_topic.zht: Denan法下進口商/申報人登記義務

summary.en: Any entity importing Specified Electrical Appliances and Materials (特定電気用品, which includes grid-tied PV inverters) into Japan must file a business notification (事業届出) with the competent METI Regional Bureau before commencing import operations. The importer assumes legal responsibility for PSE conformity. Records of conformity assessment and technical documentation must be retained for a prescribed period and made available for METI inspection on request.
summary.zh: 任何向日本进口特定电气用品（含并网光伏逆变器）的主体，须在开始进口业务前向主管METI地区局提交事业申报（事業届出）。进口商承担PSE合规的法律责任。合格评定记录及技术文件须按规定期限保存，并在METI要求时提供检查。
summary.zht: 任何向日本進口特定電氣用品（含並網光伏逆變器）的主體，須在開始進口業務前向主管METI地區局提交事業申報（事業届出）。進口商承擔PSE合規的法律責任。合格評定記錄及技術文件須按規定期限保存，並在METI要求時提供檢查。

standards_or_laws: 電気用品安全法 Article 3 (事業届出 — business notification obligation)
電気用品安全法 Article 8 (技術基準適合義務 — technical standard conformity obligation)
電気用品安全法 Article 10 (表示義務 — marking obligation)

summary.en: Chinese export compliance does not include a Japan-specific importer registration step. Chinese exporters typically obtain CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for domestic sale and may hold CE, CB, or TUV marks for export. None of these involve registration with a Japanese government authority. A Chinese manufacturer exporting directly to Japan would need to either establish a Japan-registered entity to act as the Denan notifier, or partner with a Japanese importer who files the business notification.
summary.zh: 中国出口合规不包含日本专项进口商登记环节。中国出口商通常取得CCC认证（国内销售）及CE、CB或TUV标志（出口）。上述认证均不涉及向日本政府机构登记。直接向日本出口的中国制造商须在日本注册实体作为Denan申报人，或与日本进口商合作，由后者完成事业申报。
summary.zht: 中國出口合規不包含日本專項進口商登記環節。中國出口商通常取得CCC認證（國內銷售）及CE、CB或TUV標誌（出口）。上述認證均不涉及向日本政府機構登記。直接向日本出口的中國製造商須在日本註冊實體作為Denan申報人，或與日本進口商合作，由後者完成事業申報。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — applicable to inverters for domestic CN sale
GB 8898 / GB 4943 series (safety standards for applicable product categories)

gap.en: The Denan business notification requirement has no direct CN-side parallel and is invisible to Chinese manufacturers until they attempt Japan market entry. The legal responsibility for PSE compliance shifts to whoever files the business notification in Japan — typically the importer of record. Chinese manufacturers must therefore identify or establish a Japan-side notifier before products can legally enter Japan, creating a structural market-entry barrier beyond the technical testing gap.
gap.zh: Denan事业申报要求在中国侧没有直接对应项，中国制造商在尝试进入日本市场前通常对此毫无察觉。PSE合规的法律责任由在日本提交事业申报的主体承担——通常为记录在案的进口商。因此，中国制造商须在产品合法进入日本之前确定或设立日本侧申报人，这在技术测试差距之外又构成了一个结构性市场准入壁垒。
gap.zht: Denan事業申報要求在中國側沒有直接對應項，中國製造商在嘗試進入日本市場前通常對此毫無察覺。PSE合規的法律責任由在日本提交事業申報的主體承擔——通常為記錄在案的進口商。因此，中國製造商須在產品合法進入日本之前確定或設立日本側申報人，這在技術測試差距之外又構成了一個結構性市場準入壁垒。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — failure to file business notification is a violation of Denan punishable by fine or business suspension
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent obligation exists for export from China

source.publisher: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: Chinese inverter manufacturers or their trading partners must complete a Denan business notification (事業届出) with METI before legally importing into Japan. This obligation exists independently of PSE technical conformity and is a prerequisite for market entry. The filing entity bears ongoing legal responsibility for product safety compliance. [UNVERIFIED — confirm current notification procedure, applicable Regional Bureau, and retention period for conformity records]
compliance_verdict.zh: 中国逆变器制造商或其贸易伙伴须在合法向日本进口前向METI完成Denan事业申报（事業届出）。该义务独立于PSE技术合规要求，是进入市场的前提条件。申报主体持续承担产品安全合规的法律责任。[UNVERIFIED — 请确认当前申报程序、主管地区局及合格评定记录的保存期限]
compliance_verdict.zht: 中國逆變器製造商或其貿易夥伴須在合法向日本進口前向METI完成Denan事業申報（事業届出）。該義務獨立於PSE技術合規要求，是進入市場的前提條件。申報主體持續承擔產品安全合規的法律責任。[UNVERIFIED — 請確認當前申報程序、主管地區局及合格評定記錄的保存期限]
